version_description: Some simplified chords from the record. Ad-lib scat vocals over the solo section and outro as it fades.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
[ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
[ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
[ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
  Whenever dark has fallen[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Fm7[/ch]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]            [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
  You know the spirit of the party starts to come a-live[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]
  Until the day is dawning[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]                [ch]Bbm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
  You can throw out all your blues and hit the city lights[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                          [ch]Db/F[/ch]        [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Cause there's music in the air, and lots of lovin'every-where[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
So gimme the night  (all right, to-night)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
Gimme the night       (every night)[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Fm7[/ch]     [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
  You need the evening action[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
  A place to dine, a glass of wine, a little late ro-mance[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
  It's a chain re-action[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Fm7[/ch]           [ch]Bbm7[/ch]         [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
  You'll see the people of the world coming out to dance[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                          [ch]Db/F[/ch]        [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Cause there's music in the air, and lots of lovin'every-where[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
So gimme the night      (every night)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
Gimme the night  (all right, to-night)[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]           [ch]Abm7[/ch]   [ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Ebm7[/ch]           [ch]Db[/ch]
So come on out to-night and we'll lead the others[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Abm7[/ch]         [ch]Gb[/ch]   [ch]Ebm7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
On a ride through para-dise[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Abm7[/ch]     [ch]Gb[/ch]
And if you feel all-right[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ebm7[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Abm7[/ch]     [ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Emaj7[/ch]            [ch]Db7[/ch]
Then we can be lovers cause I see that starlight look in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]           [ch]Db/F[/ch]  
Don't you know we can fly[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab]     [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
Just gimme the night  (all right, to-night)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
Gimme the night       (every night)[/tab]


[Solo]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
[ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]


[Pre-Chorus 4]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                          [ch]Db/F[/ch]        [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Cause there's music in the air, and lots of lovin'every-where[/tab]


[Chorus 4]
[tab]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
So gimme the night      (every night)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
Gimme the night  (all right, to-night)[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]           [ch]Abm7[/ch]   [ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Ebm7[/ch]           [ch]Db[/ch]
So come on out to-night and we'll lead the others[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Abm7[/ch]         [ch]Gb[/ch]   [ch]Ebm7[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
On a ride through para-dise[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Abm7[/ch]     [ch]Gb[/ch]
And if you feel all-right[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Ebm7[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Abm7[/ch]     [ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Emaj7[/ch]             [ch]Db7[/ch]
Then we can be lovers cause I see that starlight look in your eyes[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Emaj7[/ch]           [ch]Db/F[/ch]  
Don't you know we can fly[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Db/Eb[/ch]       [ch]Fm7[/ch]     [ch]Bbm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]
  And if we stay to-gether[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Fm7[/ch]               [ch]Bbm7[/ch]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
  We'll feel the rhythm of the eve-ning taking us up high[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]    [ch]Cm7[/ch]
  Never mind the weather[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Bbm7[/ch]             [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
  We'll be dancing in the street until the morning light[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 5]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                          [ch]Db/F[/ch]        [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Cause there's music in the air, and lots of lovin'every-where[/tab]


[Chorus 5]
[tab]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
So gimme the night      (every night)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
Gimme the night  (all right, to-night)[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Gimme the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]         
  Gimme the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]         
  Gimme the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]         
  Gimme the night[/tab]
